name: Topre Corporation
summary: Topre Corporation manufactures and sells components and products for automobiles, temperature-controlled logistics, air-conditioning systems, and electronic equipment in Japan, the United States, China, Mexico, and Thailand. The company offers metal press forming products and high-tensile steel plates for automobiles and office automation equipment; and constant temperature logistics products for light vehicles and heavy vehicles, as well as compact, 2t, 3t, and 4t trucks. It also provides air-conditioning equipment comprising fans, home ventilation systems, and ductless ventilation systems for use in office buildings, factories, hospitals, and houses; and electronic equipment, including keyboards, PIN pads, touch monitors, touch panels, and embedded computers. The company was formerly known as Tokyo Press Kogyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Topre Corporation in October 1985. Topre Corporation was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
